issues.description: Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' (you have DON!! cards given/attached), not 'HasRestingDon' (resting DON!! on board)
SearchDeck action missing 'rest' effect after adding DON!! from deck. Text says 'add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it' — requires Rest action or rest parameter on SearchDeck
SearchDeck filter should specify 'Don' card kind, not 'Any'
